_comment: Testing this on the Old Javanese Wordnet
title: Old Javanese Wordnet
name: OJW
tagline: A lexical resource for old Javanese

main.description: The main OJW lexical database, containing synsets, entries, senses, definitions, and examples, linked to English and Indonesian.

provenance.description: Provenance records tracing every data point back to its source and original identifier.

footer: Built by David Moeljadi and Zakariya Pamuji Aminullah.

about.intro:
The Old Javanese Wordnet was made from vocabulary extracted from the digitized version of the Old Javanese–English Dictionary (Zoetmulder, 1982). We show English and Indonesian as linked languages.

Developed by David Moeljadi. Source code on GitHub.
about.citation: If you use the Old Javanese Wordnet, please cite Moeljadi & Aminullah, (2020).   For the interface, please cite Maudslay and Bond (2026).  We are also showinf the Wordnet Bahasa
about.languageData: The Old Javanese Wordnet is a standalone resource based on vocabulary from the Old Javanese–English Dictionary (Zoetmulder, 1982), linked to English and Indonesian.

publications: David Moeljadi and Zakariya Pamuji Aminullah (2020) Building the Old Javanese Wordnet. In Proceedings of the Twelfth Language Resources and Evaluation Conference, pages 2940–2946, Marseille, France. European Language Resources Association.
